calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-07-2011 Dismissal

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-03-2011 Continued To Jul-07-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 414
MINI MINUTES: 11:17am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Fred Baker appears in pro per and is an attorney. Respondent, Nail-It, appears through Gregory Rocha. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and resond to questions from Judge Myles.

11:40am, matter is recessed for parties to try to settle.

11:45am, parties agree to settlement. If no dismissal is filed prior to 7/7/11, matter will be taken under submission and judgment entered.

11:49am
Matter is continued to 7/7/11 pending dismissal.
